EmailTemplate.name: Upload Files from Opp English
EmailTemplate.subject: Request for medical records and passport
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Assuta Mail
Greetings,
Following our conversation, please, click here to attach relevant documents.
Sincerely yours, Assuta Hospital International department Internationaldepartment@assuta.co.il
Tel Aviv, HaBarzel St. 20, Ramat Ha-Hayal, 4th floor, International department
